prompt: Bold modern agency logo on solid black background. The text 'MM' is displayed in an extremely heavy, ultra-black weight sans-serif typeface — massively thick letterforms that dominate the canvas. The MM letters are white. A single electric cyan (#00E3FF) horizontal line cuts through the middle of both M letters like a strike-through or digital glitch, creating a distinctive visual disruption. Below, 'AGENCY' appears in very small thin uppercase tracking. The aesthetic is bold, disruptive, modern — like a creative agency that breaks rules. The cyan line is the only color accent. Clean sharp vector quality, perfectly centered composition on matte black.
